zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Cantilupe於1232年出生在英國素可布拉波時，她的父親William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo48歲，母親Millicent Gournay43歲。她與Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1298年在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年66歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Cantilupe于1232年出生在英国素可布拉波时，她的父亲William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo48岁，母亲Millicent Gournay43岁。她与Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1298年在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年66岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Cantilupe was born in 1232, in Bramber, Sussex, England, her father, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, was 48 and her mother, Millicent Gournay, was 43. She married Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1298, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Cantilupe est née en 1232, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Millicent Gournay, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1298, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Cantilupe 1232 in Bramber, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo 48 und ihre Mutter Millicent Gournay 43. Sie hat Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Cantilupe è nata il nel 1232 nel Bramber, Sussex, England, sua padre, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Millicent Gournay, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1298, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Cantilupeが1232年にイギリススセックスブランバーで生まれた時，父William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Caunteloは48歳，母Millicent Gournayは43歳であった。Hywel Fychan Ap Hywelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1298年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで66歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Cantilupe(이)가 1232년 영국 수세스 브램버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent Gournay(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Cantilupe nasceu em 1232, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Millicent Gournay, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1298, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Cantilupe родилась в 1232 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent Gournay, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1298 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Cantilupe nació en 1232, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Millicent Gournay, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Hywel Fychan Ap Hywel. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1298, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Gales, Reino Unido.
